cost_explanation:
Ollama Cloud does not publish per-token prices — it bills on GPU time consumed,
which depends on model size (usage level 1–4) and request duration.
We therefore show two cost columns:
  - groq_equivalent_usd: what the same token volume would cost on Groq for the
    nearest equivalent model family. Use this to sanity-check token efficiency.
  - openai_equivalent_usd: same calculation against gpt-4o-mini as a market anchor.
To convert to Ollama Cloud subscription cost: divide your Pro/Max plan monthly fee
by your estimated monthly call count. VocalMind's 3-chain trigger runs ~24 LLM
calls per interaction (3 chains × ~8 windows). At 500 interactions/month that is
~12,000 calls/month → $0.0017/call on Pro, $0.0083/call on Max.

results.raw_response:
SELECT u.name, ROUND(AVG(pc.compliance_score)::NUMERIC * 10, 1) AS avg_compliance_score
FROM users u
JOIN interactions i ON i.agent_id = u.id AND i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
JOIN policy_compliance pc ON pc.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE u.role = 'agent'
  AND i.interaction_date >= date_trunc('month', now())
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY avg_compliance_score ASC, u.id ASC
LIMIT 5
results.judge_reasoning: result sets match (rows; alias diff ref=['name', 'avg_score'] got=['name', 'avg_compliance_score'])

results.raw_response:
SELECT u.name, ROUND(AVG(s.overall_score)::NUMERIC * 10, 1) AS avg_score
FROM users u
JOIN interactions i ON i.agent_id = u.id AND i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
JOIN interaction_scores s ON s.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE u.role = 'agent'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY avg_score DESC, u.name ASC
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(*) AS count
FROM interactions i
JOIN interaction_scores s ON s.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
  AND i.interaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND s.was_resolved = false
results.judge_reasoning: result sets match (rows; alias diff ref=['unresolved_count'] got=['count'])

results.raw_response:
SELECT u2.emotion, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM utterances u2
JOIN interactions i ON u2.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE u2.speaker_role = 'customer'
  AND i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
GROUP BY u2.emotion
ORDER BY count DESC, u2.emotion ASC
LIMIT 50

SELECT i.id::text AS interaction_id, cp.policy_title,
       ROUND(pc.compliance_score::NUMERIC * 10, 1) AS compliance_score
FROM policy_compliance pc
JOIN company_policies cp ON pc.policy_id = cp.id
JOIN interactions i ON pc.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE pc.is_compliant = false
  AND i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
  AND i.interaction_date >= date_trunc('week', now())
LIMIT 50

SELECT u.name, COUNT(*) AS frustrated_count
FROM users u
JOIN interactions i ON i.agent_id = u.id AND i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
JOIN utterances u2 ON u2.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE u.role = 'agent'
  AND u2.speaker_role = 'customer'
  AND u2.emotion = 'frustrated'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY frustrated_count DESC, u.name ASC
LIMIT 50

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', interaction_date) AS call_date, COUNT(*) AS volume
FROM interactions
WHERE organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
  AND interaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', interaction_date)
ORDER BY call_date ASC
LIMIT 50

SELECT u.name,
       ROUND((AVG(CASE WHEN s.was_resolved THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 10)::NUMERIC, 1) AS resolved_rate
FROM users u
JOIN interactions i ON i.agent_id = u.id AND i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
JOIN interaction_scores s ON s.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE u.role = 'agent'
  AND i.interaction_date >= date_trunc('month', now())
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY resolved_rate DESC, u.id ASC
LIMIT 50

SELECT i.id::text AS interaction_id, i.duration_seconds, i.interaction_date, u.name AS agent_name
FROM interactions i
JOIN users u ON i.agent_id = u.id
WHERE i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
  AND i.duration_seconds > 309
  AND i.interaction_date >= date_trunc('month', now())
ORDER BY i.duration_seconds DESC, i.id ASC
LIMIT 50

SELECT u.name, ROUND(AVG(s.overall_score)::NUMERIC * 10, 1) AS avg_score
FROM users u
JOIN interactions i ON i.agent_id = u.id AND i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
JOIN interaction_scores s ON s.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE u.role = 'agent'
  AND i.interaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '17 days'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY avg_score DESC, u.id ASC
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(*) AS unresolved_count
FROM interactions i
JOIN interaction_scores s ON s.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
  AND s.was_resolved = FALSE
  AND i.interaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '18 days'

SELECT u.emotion, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM utterances u
JOIN interactions i ON u.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE u.speaker_role = 'customer'
  AND i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
  AND i.interaction_date >= date_trunc('month', now())
GROUP BY u.emotion
ORDER BY count DESC, u.emotion ASC
LIMIT 50

SELECT ROUND(AVG(i.duration_seconds)::NUMERIC, 1) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM interactions i
JOIN users u ON i.agent_id = u.id
WHERE i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
  AND u.role = 'agent'
  AND i.processing_status = 'completed'

SELECT i.id::text AS interaction_id,
       u.name AS agent_name,
       i.interaction_date,
       ROUND(s.empathy_score::NUMERIC * 10, 1) AS empathy_score
FROM interactions i
JOIN interaction_scores s ON s.interaction_id = i.id
JOIN users u ON i.agent_id = u.id
WHERE i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
  AND s.empathy_score < 0.5
  AND i.interaction_date >= date_trunc('week', now())
ORDER BY i.interaction_date DESC, i.id ASC
LIMIT 50

SELECT COUNT(*) AS count
FROM interactions i
JOIN users u ON i.agent_id = u.id AND i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
WHERE u.role = 'agent'
  AND i.interaction_date >= date_trunc('day', now())
  AND i.processing_status != 'failed'

SELECT u.name, COUNT(*) AS frustrated_count
FROM users u
JOIN interactions i ON u.id = i.agent_id
JOIN utterances ut ON i.id = ut.interaction_id
WHERE i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
  AND u.role = 'agent'
  AND ut.speaker_role = 'customer'
  AND ut.emotion = 'frustrated'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY frustrated_count DESC, u.name ASC
LIMIT 50

SELECT u.name, ROUND(AVG(s.was_resolved::INT)::NUMERIC * 100, 1) AS resolved_rate
FROM users u
JOIN interactions i ON i.agent_id = u.id AND i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
JOIN interaction_scores s ON s.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE u.role = 'agent'
  AND i.interaction_date >= date_trunc('month', now())
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY resolved_rate DESC, u.name ASC
LIMIT 50
results.judge_reasoning: result sets match (rows; alias diff ref=['name', 'pct'] got=['name', 'resolved_rate'])

results.raw_response:
SELECT i.id::text AS interaction_id, i.duration_seconds, i.interaction_date, u.name AS agent_name
FROM interactions i
JOIN users u ON i.agent_id = u.id
WHERE i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
  AND u.role = 'agent'
  AND i.duration_seconds > 319
  AND i.interaction_date >= date_trunc('month', now())
ORDER BY i.duration_seconds DESC, i.id DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT u.name, ROUND((AVG(s.overall_score) * 10)::NUMERIC, 1) AS avg_score
FROM users u
JOIN interactions i ON i.agent_id = u.id AND i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
JOIN interaction_scores s ON s.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE u.role = 'agent'
  AND i.interaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '27 days'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY avg_score DESC, u.id ASC
LIMIT 7
